temporal_description:
A close-up, shaky shot focuses on a tangle of thick, black cables and wires in a dimly lit, green-hued environment. The camera moves through the chaotic mess of wires, creating a sense of urgency and disarray. In the top left corner, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The audio opens with a tense, low-frequency electronic hum that creates a suspenseful and ominous atmosphere.

The camera cuts to a medium shot of a man with short, graying hair, wearing a light-colored suit jacket. He stares forward with a look of intense shock and alarm, his mouth slightly agape. The background is a dimly lit room with a window and a patterned wall, both cast in a cool, green light. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. A loud, sharp, and violent crashing sound, like metal being forcefully struck or a structure collapsing, cuts through the quiet.

The view widens to a shot from behind a person sitting at a table, looking into a room filled with people. The room is dark and appears to be a small, tiled space, possibly a kitchen or a back room of a restaurant. Several men are standing and sitting around the room. The man in the suit from the previous shot is visible among the standing figures. The "风行网" text is still present. Immediately following the crash, a man shouts in a high-pitched, panicked voice, "警察，别动！别动！" which translates to "Police, don't move! Don't move!". His tone is filled with alarm and urgency, as if he is trying to command or react to a sudden, dangerous situation. The camera cuts to a medium shot of a man in a dark suit and a striped tie, looking concerned as he walks through a doorway into the room. Other people are visible in the background behind him. The lighting is dark and the overall color palette is green and muted. The "风行网" text is visible in the top left corner. The tense electronic music continues to play in the background, maintaining a feeling of high-stakes drama and confrontation.
